zh.lifeSummary: 當William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal於1277年9月24日出生在英國素福爾可哈迪斯莫時，他的父親John Marshal20歲，母親Hawise de Saye19歲。他和Christian FitzWalter至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1314年6月24日在蘇格蘭享年36歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal于1277年9月24日出生在英国素福爾可哈迪斯莫时，他的父亲John Marshal20岁，母亲Hawise de Saye19岁。他和Christian FitzWalter至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1314年6月24日在苏格兰享年36岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Marshal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Marshall  .

variants.name: Marshall
meanings: English: usually an occupational name ‘farrier’, occasionally a status name ‘chief official of a royal household or court; a high officer of state’, from Middle English mareshal and Old French maresc(h)al. An even wider range of meanings is found in some other languages: compare for example Polish Marszałek (see Marszalek ). This name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century. It is also borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal was born on 24 September 1277, in Hartismere, Suffolk, England, his father, John Marshal, was 20 and his mother, Hawise de Saye, was 19. He had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Christian FitzWalter. He died on 24 June 1314, in Scotland, at the age of 36, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal est né le 24 septembre 1277, à Hartismere, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Marshal, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Saye, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Christian FitzWalter. Il est décédé le 24 juin 1314, à Écosse, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal am 24. September 1277 in Hartismere, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Marshal 20 und seine Mutter Hawise de Saye 19. Er hatte mit Christian FitzWalter mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Juni 1314 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal è nato il il 24 settembre 1277 nel Hartismere, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Marshal, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Hawise de Saye, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Christian FitzWalter. Morì il 24 giugno 1314, nel Scotland, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: William Marshal 1st Lord Marshalが1277年9月24日にイギリススフォルクハーティスメアで生まれた時，父John Marshalは20歳，母Hawise de Sayeは19歳であった。彼はChristian FitzWalterとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1314年6月24日にスコットランドで36歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal(이)가 1277년 9월 24일 영국 수폴크 하티스머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Marshal(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise de Saye(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Christian FitzWalter(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1314년 6월 24일 스컷랜드에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.24 September 1277–24 June 1314: 24 de setembro de 1277–24 de junho de 1314
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal nasceu em 24 de setembro de 1277, em Hartismere, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Marshal, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Saye, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Christian FitzWalter. Ele faleceu em 24 de junho de 1314, em Scotland, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal родился 24 сентября 1277 г. в местности хартисмир, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Marshal было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Saye, 19. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Christian FitzWalter. Он умер 24 июня 1314 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.24 September 1277–24 June 1314: 24 de septiembre de 1277–24 de junio de 1314
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal nació el 24 de septiembre de 1277, en Hartismere, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Marshal, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Hawise de Saye, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Christian FitzWalter. Murió el 24 de junio de 1314, en Scotland, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
